package rulecoverage

func NegativeSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTests() string {
    ruleID := "sql_query_text_asserted_in_handler_tests"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "SQL-shape assertions written at handler level instead of repository tests."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
